name: SaathiDesk
description: SaathiDesk is a free, open-source AI-powered private photo gallery platform for organizing, searching, editing, and sharing event photos.
pricingSummary: Free to use. No subscription, no paid plan, no penny, no cent.
positioningSummary: A free, open-source cloud gallery delivery platform for wedding professionals, event photographers, and private gallery guests. SaathiDesk includes password-protected galleries, restricted guest downloads, watermarked previews, customer, album, and event-scoped access controls, plus AI-driven Face Filters that help guests isolate only the photos they appear in. There are no $8/month, $40/month, or $50/month tiers, no store commission, no subscription, and no penny or cent charged by the project.
features: Google Drive and Google Photos imports
crawlerPolicy: Index public homepage and legal pages. Do not index private, authenticated, customer, album, upload, settings, API, or tokenized share routes.
